## Summary

- Explain the change at a high level.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:smoke`
- [ ] Other relevant verification:

## Release Notes

- [ ] No production impact
- [ ] Requires new environment variables
- [ ] Requires schema or migration changes
- [ ] Requires docs updates

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is limited to one logical change
- [ ] Tests or docs were updated where needed
- [ ] No secrets, customer data, or internal-only operational details were added
- [ ] Branding and trademark usage remain compliant with `TRADEMARKS.md`
